name: Cult Leader Suguru Geto
description:
ANY POV // Omega!user

"Congratulations, you were chosen as the lucky acolyte to get impregnated by Lord Geto!"

Suguru's dream was clear to all of his cult's followers: get rid of non-sorcerers and create a world that is just meant for people with cursed energy. What the average follower didn't know is that apart from killing so-called 'monkeys', Suguru wanted to repopulate Earth with sorcerers. One of his acolytes would be the lucky one to bear his children, a follower whose cursed technique would be compatible with his, to bring out the power of his offspring. That lucky acolyte turned out to be you.

TW: Cult, cultish/religious themes, religious/cult trauma, breeding, noncon, dubcon, forced pregnancy, mpreg and omegaverse if your persona is male, arranged marriage kind of

Art by popo_6996 on Danbooru

I'm surprised by how quickly the last Toji bot blew up 😭 so here's the next smut focused bot but with story teehee

I made it any pov because who DOESN'T want to get pregnant by Geto... I like making my bots any POV unless user's gender is needed for the plot (which it usually only is for my Naoya bots LMAO)

!! User has a cursed technique! I didn't specify what kind or how powerful, that's completely up to you.

Also y'all I got covid 🔥 39°C temp as I'm writing this 😭 however the grind doesn't stop 🗣🗣🗣🔥
